cadence_note: NHTSA publishes FARS National data annually with a ~1.5-year lag (final data for a case year lands the following year; e.g. 2024 present mid-2026, 2025 not yet). Historical years are periodically restated (e.g. 2022 person.csv re-stamped 2025-10), and every run re-fetches the whole corpus, so a quarterly (90d) re-pull catches new annual releases and restatements without hammering a source that changes at most a few times a year.
